title: Image Details
sourceTitle: Image Details Subject Description Young Adult Female
prompt: { "image_details": { "subject": { "description": "Young adult female with an athletic build.", "hair": "Long, dark brown hair, worn down and slightly tossed, with the left hand gently resting in it.", "face": "Fair skin, subtle and natural makeup, looking back over her left shoulder directly into the camera with a neutral, confident expression." }, "apparel": { "clothing": "Form-fitting, high-cut, solid white sleeveless bodysuit.", "footwear": "Solid white ankle-length socks featuring two white horizontal stripes at the top and the word 'alo' printed in lowercase white text.", "accessories": "A delicate bracelet on the left wrist and a few small rings on the fingers of the right hand." }, "pose": { "body_position": "Standing in a side-profile stance.", "legs": "Left leg is straight and supporting her weight on the ground. Right leg is bent at the knee, stepped up with the foot resting flat on a wooden box.", "arms": "Left arm is raised, elbow pointing outward, with the hand touching the back of her head/hair. Right arm stretches downward, with the hand resting lightly on her right knee/thigh." }, "environment": { "background": "Seamless white studio backdrop.", "props": "A simple, square, unpainted wooden plyometric box showing natural wood grain." }, "image_quality_and_style": { "resolution": "4k resolution, Ultra High Definition (HD)", "format_details": "RAW photo, uncompressed, unedited, straight out of camera (SOOC), high dynamic range.", "camera_settings": "Shot at f/11 or f/16 aperture for infinite depth of field. Absolutely zero background blur or bokeh. Everything from the foreground to the absolute background is in razor-sharp focus.", "lighting": "Professional studio lighting, soft and even, creating subtle, natural shadows on the floor and right side of the body to highlight muscle definition.", "style": "Photorealistic, hyper-detailed fitness/fashion editorial photography, extremely sharp focus across the entire frame, crisp edges.", "aspect_ratio": "4:5" }, "generated_prompt": "RAW photo, unedited, straight out of camera, 4k HD, highly detailed, photorealistic studio portrait of a young athletic woman. She has long dark brown hair and is looking back over her left shoulder at the camera. She is wearing a form-fitting, solid white sleeveless bodysuit and solid white ankle socks with white stripes and 'alo' text. She is posed in profile with her left foot on the floor and her right foot elevated, resting on a plain wooden plyometric box. Her left hand is raised, running through her hair, and her right hand rests on her right knee. Shot against a seamless white studio background. Professional soft studio lighting, f/16 aperture, infinite depth of field, absolutely no background blur, zero bokeh, razor-sharp focus from foreground to background, hyper-detailed skin and wood texture, editorial fitness photography. Aspect ratio 4:5." } }
